query: I need to fine-tune Llama 3.1 70B on my custom dataset. I have AWS and GCP credentials set up. Can you write me a task YAML that uses 8xH100s and make sure it checkpoints to S3 every 1000 steps? I want to use spot instances to save money.

we have a kubernetes cluster at work and I want to run a vllm inference server on it with 2 A100s. need it to autoscale based on traffic — during business hours we get ~50 qps but at night it drops to almost nothing. whats the best way to set this up

My training job keeps getting preempted on GCP. I'm using spot T4s for a BERT fine-tuning run that takes about 6 hours. Is there a way to automatically recover and resume from the last checkpoint when I get preempted? I don't want to babysit it.

I want to launch a dev environment with a single H100 GPU where I can SSH in and iterate on my code. Something that auto-shuts down after 30 minutes of idle so I don't waste money. I have credentials for AWS, GCP, and Lambda — just pick whatever's cheapest.

Need to run a hyperparameter sweep for my RL training — 12 different configs, each needs an A100 for about 4 hours. I want them to run in parallel across whatever clouds have availability. Each job should be independent and recover if it gets interrupted.
We're trying to figure out which cloud has the cheapest H200 GPUs right now. We need 8xH200 for about a week of training. Can you compare prices across AWS, GCP, Azure, Lambda, and Coreweave?

i have a slurm cluster at my university and also an AWS account. i want to submit training jobs that try the slurm cluster first (its free) and fall back to aws if slurm is full. how do i set that up?

I need to do multi-node distributed training with PyTorch DDP across 4 nodes, each with 8 H100s. The nodes need to communicate over high-bandwidth interconnect. Can you help me write the config and launch it?

Help me deploy a production ML serving endpoint for our recommendation model. We need it to handle variable load, scale down to 1 replica at night, and scale up to 5 during peak. We want to serve from both AWS and GCP for redundancy.

I have a skypilot task.yaml file in my repo at configs/train.yaml but when I try to launch it I get 'resources not available' errors. Can you help me debug this and maybe add fallback options so it tries different GPU types?
I want to deploy my FastAPI web application to AWS. It's a standard REST API with a PostgreSQL database, no ML or GPU needed. Should I use ECS, Lambda, or EC2? Help me write the Terraform config.
Can you help me set up a new Kubernetes cluster from scratch on AWS using eksctl? I need to configure node groups, set up the VPC, install the ingress controller, and configure RBAC for my team.

I'm trying to optimize my PyTorch model's training loop — it's running on my local RTX 4090 but the GPU utilization is only 40%. Can you profile the code and suggest where the bottlenecks are? I think the dataloader might be the issue.

I want to fine-tune GPT-4o through the OpenAI API using my custom dataset. I have a JSONL file with 10k examples. Can you help me write the fine-tuning script using the openai Python SDK and set up the hyperparameters?
Help me write a Helm chart for deploying our microservice application to Kubernetes. It needs a Deployment, Service, HPA, and Ingress. The app is a Node.js API server.
I need to build a CI/CD pipeline in GitHub Actions that runs our ML model tests on every PR. The tests need a GPU runner — can you help me configure the workflow YAML for self-hosted GPU runners?

We're evaluating cloud GPU providers for our startup. Can you make me a spreadsheet comparing pricing, availability, and features of AWS, GCP, Azure, Lambda, CoreWeave, and Together AI? I just need the research, not launching anything.

I want to use Ray Serve to deploy my model on a Ray cluster that I already have running. Help me write the Ray Serve deployment script and configure autoscaling. I'm managing the cluster myself through Ray.

Can you help me write a Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml for my ML training environment? I want to run training locally in a container with GPU passthrough. I'm using nvidia-docker on my workstation.
I need to set up Weights & Biases experiment tracking for my training runs. Can you help me integrate wandb into my training script and configure the project dashboard?
